name: Rusty Sword
description: A battered short sword with a pitted blade. Still sharp enough to cut.

name: Health Potion
description: A small vial of crimson liquid that shimmers faintly.

name: Leather Armor
description: Supple leather armor that offers modest protection.

name: Torch
description: A sturdy wooden torch wrapped in oil-soaked cloth.

name: Iron Key
description: A heavy iron key with an ornate bow. It must open something important.

name: Healing Herb
description: A fragrant green herb known for its restorative properties.

name: Glowing Stone
description: A smooth stone that pulses with a faint inner light.

name: Herbal Remedy
description: A poultice made from healing herbs. Restores a moderate amount of health.
